message:
fix(freeze): add push_const, for_in, and 'in' opcode handlers

- Add push_const handler in zig_codegen_full (was missing, only push_const8 existed)
- Add for_in_start, for_in_next handlers in zig_codegen_relooper
- Add 'in' operator handler in zig_codegen_relooper
- Remove duplicate extern declarations in zig_jsvalue.zig

Test results:
- tRPC: Now runs (was failing with unsupported opcode error)
- 2/20 tests pass (other failures are unrelated to opcodes)
